message:
fix: downgrade fsfs unsafe_code from forbid to deny

forbid cannot be overridden by #[allow], but we need a scoped allow
for the libc::kill(pid, 0) PID liveness checks in concurrency.rs and
lifecycle.rs. deny provides the same protection while permitting
targeted exceptions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
